sys_script_fix.description:
This fix script creates a record in the Organizational User Table for Every unique OU Member in the Organizational Member table. The script also moves all global permissions from the OU Member table to the OU User Tabale
2.8.5 | 2023-06-23 | RAJ | DFCT0011726 - Name updated to 2.8.5
sys_script_fix.name: 2.8.5 - Organizational User - Migration
